'''pavuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadholder|leadholder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadholder|leadholder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pavuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pævizhith|pævizhith]] || [[word:pævizhij|pævizhij]] || [[word:pævizhish|pævizhish]] || [[word:pævizhi|pævizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pavuvuzhuth|pavuvuzhuth]] || [[word:pavuvuzhuj|pavuvuzhuj]] || [[word:pavuvuzhush|pavuvuzhush]] || [[word:pavuvuzhu|pavuvuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pavuzhuth|pavuzhuth]] || [[word:pavuzhuj|pavuzhuj]] || [[word:pavuzhush|pavuzhush]] || [[word:pavuzhu|pavuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pavufzhuth|pavufzhuth]] || [[word:pavufzhuj|pavufzhuj]] || [[word:pavufzhush|pavufzhush]] || [[word:pavufzhuf|pavufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pavuzhuthu|pavuzhuthu]] || [[word:pavuzhuju|pavuzhuju]] || [[word:pavuzhushu|pavuzhushu]] || [[word:pavuzhuku|pavuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pavuzhuth|pavuzhuth]] || [[word:pavuzhuj|pavuzhuj]] || [[word:pavuzhush|pavuzhush]] || [[word:pavuzhu|pavuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pavuzhuthul|pavuzhuthul]] || [[word:pavuzhujul|pavuzhujul]] || [[word:pavuzhushul|pavuzhushul]] || [[word:pavuzhukul|pavuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pavuzhuthuthu|pavuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:pavuzhujuju|pavuzhujuju]] || [[word:pavuzhushushu|pavuzhushushu]] || [[word:pavuzhuku|pavuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pavuzhuthun|pavuzhuthun]] || [[word:pavuzhujun|pavuzhujun]] || [[word:pavuzhushun|pavuzhushun]] || [[word:pavuzhukun|pavuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pavuzhuthuoro|pavuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:pavuzhujuoro|pavuzhujuoro]] || [[word:pavuzhushuoro|pavuzhushuoro]] || [[word:pavuzhukuoro|pavuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
